chunks.title: Eliphaz on the fate of the fool
chunks.reason: Eliphaz addresses Job directly regarding the consequences of ignorance and the inevitability of trouble.

chunks.title: Eliphaz on God's power and justice
chunks.reason: Eliphaz shifts to describing God's sovereign actions in lifting the lowly and frustrating the crafty.

chunks.title: Eliphaz on accepting divine discipline
chunks.reason: Eliphaz exhorts Job to accept God's correction and promises blessings for those who do.

chunks.title: Conclusion of Eliphaz's speech
chunks.reason: Eliphaz concludes his argument by asserting the truth of his investigation.
